form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an effortless winner after leading throughout, scoring by 6 lengths in a Mix 6/7 at Horsham and clocking an outstanding 27.15 for the 485m trip. Rates a top chance if runs up to time two back.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Restricted WIN H on March 27 over 425m at this track behind Black Marvel beaten 5 lengths (24.11). Overdue a win and gets his chance to break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on turn off back straight and fell.
